reviews.review_description: I’d say get yeeps it’s a lot better than GT there’s cooler perks for content creators it’s has more game modes I sometimes get banned for stuff I didn’t do but otherwise this is the best GT vr game they update stuff people want everybody likes the update sure there’s a few p2w perks but I’m sorry but you’ve just got to accept it that’s how everything is I can say this game is a lot better than GT in the p2w category. 2.0 changed my perspective of vr games entirely do I miss some stuff from 1.0 yeah but they added a lot of stuff I didn’t think was possiple. Thanks for making my life happier Nathan,Steve  and the rest of Trass games. 😀

I played this game when it launched on applab and I continued to be a loyal fan up until the launch of the 2.0 update. Since then the game has completely shifted from its original gameplay to an experience only enjoyable if you're a washed up YouTuber fleeing from rec room or under the age of 13. This experience is no longer enjoyable

I've been in this community for over 2 years, and the amount of awesome memories I've made is uncountable! The people in this community are really friendly and creative. It's so much fun jumping on Yeeps and doing literally anything! I absolutely love the ability to customize how your items look, aswell as making your own maps and being ablento share them with others! On top of that, Trass does a fantastic job with their updates and genuinely listens to their community

200 hours spent in this game. And must I say they havent really solved the bigges issue is the grind. I introduced my friends and they said "Oh so it is similar to roblox creation let me try!" And when they saw the grind they have to do to ATLEAST make their world made me switch perspectives. Not only they need to spend quite the time to get all the (they play 4 hours a week) stuff this game is very paid to gain. Once you finish the easy butt coins you are left with 2k a week and that can get you 2 BLOCKS. And there is so many tech webs to get from. If you played from alpha to current state you wouldnt have this issue but now as a beginner you have quite the issue as you have 7 tech webs to grab items each getting more expensive.

-please atleast give me an answer why or if I am wrong cause this is quite frustrating.

If you like Minecraft and Roblox and gorilla tag movement you will love this game you like building they got you  wanna go fishing or play competitive tag and hide and seek yep they got that all tho there are some toxic people but mods are everywhere so no worry GET YEEPS HIDE AND SEEK NOW 😏🦶￼

Yeeps is honestly one of my favorite games. The creativity and freedom it gives players is just insane, but what I love the most is Adventure Mode (open world). It feels so fun to explore, like there’s always something new to discover.

Running around the map, finding cool spots, and just messing around with friends never gets boring. The open-world vibe makes it feel way bigger than just a regular game.

Huge respect to the devs for putting so much effort into this. I can’t wait to see how this game evolves

Don't get me wrong, I love yeeps but l was in a lobby and a couple kids were trading crabs, one kid put his crab in first and the other kid said “sorry" and left. I then heard the first kid cry and I tried to make him feel better by giving him crabs, and another person gave him a king crab then he felt better, but yeeps should really add a trading table.

Ok so when I first got this game all the maps were so fun and enjoyable but recently in the new maps they aren’t as good or nostalgic as the other ones and once the update is gone they barley invest in it I liked the pvp update but here’s the issue there is not that many new features going into the old updates cause if you want to have fun you have to go to the new updates instead of the old ones and the kicking features are annoying manly because I was playing in a pvp map until some random dude kicked me for killing someone there are a lot of reviews telling you that the one stars are fake but they are just over looking all the problems.

I don’t know how they did it, trash games probably just made the best hand movement game out there. There’s so much to do and you will never get bored. Also great community, the only thing they need to work on is for their mobile app it crashes way to often but otherwise I highly recommend Yeeps for all players (ages 10+)

reviews.review_title: Anyone that say 1 star is playing wrong
reviews.review_description: Sorry, it doesn't say "says" but onto my review. The best game I've ever played, I haven't played another game in almost a whole year,easy to learn hard to master, multiple gadgets to use, what else could you ask for. And those that get made when you call someone a Retard and expect not to get banned, thats just a skill issue

It’s just I just get heartbroken when I see these people one starring the game because I got permanently ban so please fix this. ￼AND ALSO 2.0 IS GREAT😎(even though I haven’t played it because I’m on vacation)

This game, Yeeps, is a cool and fun to play game, especially with family and friends. You can play and make fun community worlds that makes the game even more fun. This game is unique in its style of making a game within a game. That"s what makes the game PEAK! (The 1 star reviews are fake by the way)

I got my vr Christmas day and from that moment loved vr .... Since that day i got friends memories and lots of fun,but yeeps is the biggest part of my journey on vr and will hold a great part in my vr little self.the community is is strong and loving.think you trass game for giving me the best experience on vr.

I have had this game for a little over 2 YEARS… and it’s been heartwarming seeing how passionate the developers are to making this the best game they can possibly make.

There’s so much creativity in it that you can literally do anything in it, such as making custom items, compete in contests to build maps, make your own WORLDS, go in adventure and explore an open world environment and more!

Seriously there is so much to do in this game that the possibilities are endless. Also the game isn’t “pay to win” you can get so much stuff from not buying anything with real money!

If you don’t have this game already and you’re looking be for fun, creative and social games, get Yeeps now!

reviews.review_title: So good, gtag is copying it
reviews.review_description: Some people may look at this game and say "oh look, another gtag knockoff". They are completely wrong. All this game took from gtag was arm movement, and gtag let's anyone use that for free. This game has been getting more popular everyday, and gtag is starting to copy updates from it. Play this, not pixelated monkey game (gtag).

Awesome community I love how if you just joined the whole server comes over to help you and they give you stuff like grapplers to swing with also besides the good community the graphics are awesome and not to mention the talented players that are building fun worlds everyday and there’s nothing that’s bad also love the new space update btw. :)

it's the best game ever you guys should download it it has anything you could possibly want and it has molds um apps and like more black it's the best you can get on anything it's awesome and you can get it for free on vr and mobile you should really get it play meet people it's fun making new friends

Today I joined home and it’s gone it’s just deleted then I joined horror and guess what it’s gone and you get stuck please fix this and don’t join horror or else you get stuck  																																																																														sincerely  gambit 
￼

I love this game and everything about it but the space update was a tad lacking. While yes the gravity was the main focus I think, the gadgets were a little bit lacking. The lazer sword is overpowered and the 3 other ones have very little variation to make them unique, 800 for the basically the same gadget 4 times is ludicrous, and double bat damage for 100 as a trade off isn't enough, as a goblin siege player the meta is out of wack now. The lazer pistol is solid tho, despite having no drop off making it pretty difficult to use its fun and not over powered, sorta, it has it's bull crap moments in goblin siege but it's not that bad. The jetpack is 1,200 for a weak movement item, it's dull and only goes up, not only that it looks dumb, and the handles get in the way of grabbing, make the hitbox for grabbing a tad smaller. I don't have the wrist gun yet so no comment. I also wanna complain about custom items for a second. While yes you can make money off them, 500 is ludicrous for 50 coins everytime someone purchases it. For recolors it should only cost maybe 300 maybe even just 1000 to 10,000 beans. Before they added making money off of reskins they should've just cost beans, beans for a reskin that doesn't enhance gameplay and is purely cosmetic would've made sense, beans are basically useless to this day, except for bait, and honestly fishing is super boring. I only make reskins for myself and not for selling so it pains me having to grind for 500 coins and have nothing left for upcoming updates

It around 2024 when I was bored I remembered a sponser for a YouTube video so I install the game and oh my god it was amazing sure at first it was just hide and seek but community worlds made up for that which is another thing people have a lot of creative freedom once 2.0 came out I didn’t really like it but they added stuff that was really fun then the content creators and owners can interact with the community really well and you only have to be 10 to play not 13, 10 and with gorilla tag dying it is definitely way better

reviews.review_title: What used to be a hide and seek game
reviews.review_description: So at the start of Yeeps it used to feel like an original game. Yes it may have the gtag movement but it was different from the other gtag games. A game with a tech tree and we'll hide and seek. Until one day 2.0 came along I thought this wouldn't really change anything until it was released. Now playing hide and seek it's hard to even get to and once I finally got through the maze of maps, I went to the blue house map and no one was here, what about the others maps? No one... Now this game feels like nothing how it was in fact they removed hide and seek from the name of the game. Now it feels more like a Roblox copy, but it just doesn't fit this as the tools to even make games are expensive to get. And they just don't have the power to give creators a good chance to make a lot, now I know other players like how it is now but most people probably started playing this game for the hide and seek. To see this game switch its gameplay this fast and hide the original game buried away where only few can see. Thanks for reading this paragraph of me yapping but I doubt anyone actually has this is only my opinion on this game play it if you want.

I have been playing Yeeps since June 14th 2024 and man every update has so much effort put into it! The devs gave Yeeps the ability to build and create maps with gamemodes by spending a currency that you can earn without spending a dime! I get being a new player is hard to get all the items but when you earn the items you can just build and build. Also the community will give players blocks they need to keep building on and on! 5/5

just remove the kicking feature at this point i have been kicked more times than i can count for killing someone in a pvp map it is stupid just remove it is the  worst feature this game has ever added. oh and also this community is disgusting game i go into there was a 42 year old man talking to like a 3 year old and half the people that just played just scream at you. and mock my words this game is gonna die because of its own community

Yeeps is a very fun multiplayer game. That has lots of game modes and customization to items and the playing outfit. But because it’s multiplayer there’s sometimes inappropriate or mean players. But there is a lot of lab rat(players with direct access to the discord). And on the discord you or they can talk to moderators about them to hopefully get them banned .

Deeply deeply disappointing! Would be no stars!

I have been playing this game ever since the theater update came out and I love it. The amount of things you can build are endless. They released the space update and it is AMAZING! IT OPENED A NEW DOOR TO GRAVITY WHICH THAT MAKES THE POSSIBILITIES 10X MORE!

Great job Trass games and I can not wait for your next game.

I have the problem where it doesn’t let me join a server because it failed to load into my Meta account and I’ve done everything you told me to do to fix it, but it didn’t work so I went on Discord and then I used those ways but it still didn’t work. Yeeps is a wonderful game. I have been playing since it first came out and have not stopped playing since. I don’t know how helpful this review may be or if someone out there will even read this. But if you are hesitant on getting this game, now’s the time to stop. There is so much content for a free game. You can play different games from tap tag to laser tag. You can do races with friends or build wonderful sky bases. Imagine exploring maps built by other players and dueling your best friends with bats. All in all just get the game. If you don’t like it the oh well. It did not cost you anything. And it’s not even pay to win.

I started in rocket bundle this game was the best I can’t let go of it or imagine it dying I love this game I even started a channel named wrenchfox just to convince how good yeeps made my life I learned how to save up and spend money more correctly better then ever I love this game and can’t wait for more updates on it

reviews.review_title: THEY DID THE SPACE UPDATE RIGHT!
reviews.review_description:
When I heard they were doing a space update I thought it was going to be like the dessert biome (messy, nobody plays and uncreative in my opinion) but no it was the best update since the updates back in 1.0 and I'll tell you why, back in 2.0 it had a theme (hide and seek/sleep) but when 2.0 came out it threw that all away, and ever since 2.0 came out it just feels empty and no soul put into the updates (no offence). But when the space biome came out it BLOW MY MIND, The items and maps were simple and not over decorated, the tech web was organized, AND THEY MADE MORE ART IN YEEPS ART STYLE! The reason why I'm so happy about the art style is because we have not seen a lot since 1.0 (besides the update loading screen plus they are turning to 3D) and seeing the planets designed so perfect just gave me hope for the next update. And the items were creative and not over priced unlike the dessert biome and so not overly crowed like the fantasy, the maps remind me off 1.0 which is a very good thing because I hate seeing these big complex buildings, they feel empty and unoriginal but the space biome feels amazing to play and admire the design of the maps and races put into them.


OVER ALL
this update was done almost perfect! All they need to do is keep this up and (I know this sounds bad but) Get rid of sensitive mini mods, I don't know how but if they can get these 2 things done, Yeeps would be good again...

Best game ever better than gtag and i love playing it just add the 1.0 maps back because i do love 2.0 but i remember some chill times in 1.0 and it was so nice and good also pls add a system where you can transfer silver beans to buttcoins and buttcoins to silver beans plus theres these swords you can buy for 10,000 silver beans can we alter that and add them to creative like spawn pads for them. THANKS NATHAN JACK AND STEVE FOR SUCH A GOOD GAME EVERY UPDATE IS AMAZING AND YEEPS IS THE BEST VR GAME EVER

Yeeps is a amazing game. If you are thinking about buying it, do so! It is very creative and has a great community. I’ve been addicted for two years and have picked up the lab rat role along the way and have spent over $250 on the game ( it is not pay-to-win but there are occasional bundles ). Overall great game, thanks Trass!

I have been playing this game for 2 years now and I have loved it the whole time they even have programs like the lab rat program that allows you to test out new updates before anyone else to rate it and find bugs
They also have the content creator program
Which allows you to be known for making content on the best parts of Yeeps my favorite part is the new updates and community worlds because I love surprises and trying out different things other people have made and Yeeps has tons of things to make content on the possibilities are literally endless MAKE SURE TO SUBSCRIBE TO MY YOUTUBE CHANNEL RyanPlaysVR

AND DONT YOU DARE SAY FRIENDLY COMMUNITY WHEN THERE ARE RARELY PEOPLE THAT ARE FRIENDLY. 49.9% PEOPLE WHO ALSO DISRUPT GAMEPLAY/ACT TUFF. 50% RULE BREAKERS 0.1% ACTUALLY GOOD PEOPLE. I WOULD LEAVE A 5 STAR REVIEW IF YOU ALSO ADDED A 1x1 RAIL BLOCK. I HAD A COOL IDEA, BUT NO. I HAVE TO MAKE STATIONS WHERE U HAVE TO USE AIR GRABBERS UNDERWATER JUST TO GO ONTO A DIFFERENT RAIL.

I cannot stop playing jeeps hide, and seek the new updates are so constant but so good my favorite thing to do is go fishing and one of the newest maps and make community worlds. The newest space update is so fun but the new fish are so easy to get. I’m only needing one left. I’m insisting you need to get this game on your VR ￼￼

Some people think that Yeeps is just bad or boring but it’s really fun because there’s classic game modes, building, community worlds, there’s a friends system and the devs are just really nice because not only they make good updates but they plan updates ahead of time as well they host really fun and cool events like live streams, obstacle courses , and SOOOOOO much more

reviews.review_title: Main Reason Why I Now Play VR
reviews.review_description:
Dear Yeeps Devs & everybody seeing this review,

     This is my favorite VR game. I have 690 hours played on it after 552 days. 

     As a LR, CC, and just a normal, but a famous YT with 1,154 subs, life in Yeeps is amazing. I’ve also made a song for Yeeps called “Soundless Solitude.” (Although I didn’t want to send it)

     I love testing new labs, especially ones related to holidays, like the toymaker lab. If nothing is more fun than doing labs, I don’t know what is.

     The main reason I started playing this game is because I wanted to get used to knew things. And Yeeps was the perfect game.

     So, that is why, I call Yeeps the best game. Hope everybody seen this letter has a good day, and do the stuff you believe you can do! :)

Sincerely, Microphone VR

          🟦🟦
     🟦🟦🟦🟦
🟦🟦🟦🟦🟦🟦
🟦🟦🟦🟦🟦🟦
⬛️🟪🟪🟪🟪⬛️
     ⬛️⬛️⬛️⬛️

For like a week. Saying that i don't exist? fix this.

Yeeps is an amazing game because it they don’t just make updates and change the main maps Yeeps adds maps correlating the update. The space update is literally out of the world update and the way it was made was pretty cool especially the new game modes and gadgets made so much sense and could be inspiration for other games.

I love yeeps a lot! My friend told me about it and I was bored so I played it and it was amazing. I could listen to so many great things about it but that would take too long, so I’ll write the few bad things about it.

First: confusing for beginners (I think that the back to the suburbs update helped but there is so much content that there is only so much they can do about that)

Second: toxicity (again only so much you can do about that)

Finally: the daily quests are sometimes a little hard to do (mostly because some of them REQUIRE specific items to complete I know it’s so the quests are hard enough so you can’t just get two hundred butt-coins a day still I don’t mind if the daily quests are the same it’s okay) 

If the deves see this consider what I said.
Thank you for making an amazing game.

there were griefers in only up and a kid broke his finger and he said its snapped in half and were saying it was bleeding  i comforted him And I CAME AT THE GRIEFER AND WHEN I CALLED HIM A RETARD FOR LAUGHING AND GRIEFING  AND ALSO GRIEFING EVERYONE AT THE END AND IM GETTING MUTED THIS GAME IS TRASH IM SWITCHING TO BONELAB

I want the old maps back not whatever this boring stuff is And im not paying money just to play the old better ones nor do i want to WAIT A WEEK just to play them for free not to mention i have to vote for one of the old maps I miss hide and seek the randoms I see do as well some things like the horror mode are fun but everything else like the different worlds holds your attention for 20 mins or less. I tried coming back after months later to see if this game was better but no it’s still the same it’s sad because this game use to be so fun.

This game is so well made its just insane, the absolute beutiful moderation that ive literally seen work IN THE MOMENT when I reported someone through discord VR. The kick system is the biggest reason my build in Wilds have stayed up for more than 10 minutes. Another reason this game is goated is because it NEVER misses, the villian update wasnt my favorite nor was the puma update but at least it has CONTENT unlike other games

Yeeps just came out with a space update and I have to say, it’s one of the best updates I’ve played! It introduced many gadgets, gravity, and tons of new blocks and cosmetics! The maps are super well made as well! However I do have some concerns…
To start, everything is great but I wish they had EXPANDED on gravity. There are only 2 blocks relating to gravity and I wish they had more. I would like to have more setting regarding gravity like if items are affected or not, or a choice on how much of a type of gravity instead of set amounts.
Next, the maps are awesome but they were a bit underwhelming. There were 2 hangout maps and a laser tag map. I wish there were more minigame maps or interactive stuff within the maps.
Lastly I want to talk on the gadgets. They are AWESOME but it did feel a bit lackluster for the most suggested biome. There was a jetpack, magnet, laser gun, light sabers, laser tag gun and a gravity bomb. It seems like a lot on paper but for the MOST SUGGESTED UPDATE?? I feel like they could’ve added more unique gadgets instead of making 4 versions of the light sabers… I mainly just wish there were more UNIQUE and SPECIAL gadgets.
Don’t get me wrong, this update is still INSANE, but for the most suggested biome, it could’ve been better…

Don’t get me wrong the item are cool but I expected an adventure update because we have been waiting for an adventure update for MONTHS. I expected more mobs instead of 2 mobs that basically is the same things as bugs and wasps but just reskinned.I expected an alien boss because we haven’t gotten of boss In MONTHS (again). I really hope they add adventure updates to the space update soon.

The game is extremely fun, and hardly has any problems!
The amount of content in this game is genuinely amazing, from the building to the game modes, even the hangout is so polished and fun! 

Side note: PLEASE ADD THE PRIVATE WORLDS MAP BACK! It is so hard to get people to playtest my maps now and the private worlds map made it so easy to find participants.

Side-note please make more custom items for the update packs and less reskins, even if they’re useless (They’re still fun!)

In the end it’s still an overall great game and I’d highly recommend checking it out.

Amazing gameplay. There is building, gamemodes, pets, cosmetics, pvp and more! This is my favorite VR game of all time! Only problem is the toxicity. But besides that I have spent so much time in this game and have many of the items. There is an adventure mode, but it is not the greatest. Not as complete. There are plushies I have bought, and a spinoff game coming as well. If you haven’t bought it yet, then now is the best time to!

It has a fun gameplay loop, cool social stuff, but after a while it gets somewhat boring. The new updates, the space update and desert update especially, add less content outside of building stuff in creative worlds or gadgets. There's barely an adventure mode since everything is just from the old map from the 2.0 update. Nobody plays game modes after their respective update. I haven't seen anyone in battlecrafts, outlaw, or gladiator arena once after their update, laser tag will probably follow suit. There's barely any new maps the new team makes. The most they made since 2.0 and home was fishing, the 3 space maps, the PUMA collab, the two superhero maps, and that's it. And most of these maps are so boring that people don't really ever explore them at all and just go for the cool tech web stuff and minigames. The yeeps team should try making the map be one huge connected world again instead of multiple connected maps. I miss having to find maps, I miss having to look for things instead of just having a big red arrow pointing to the new update.

reviews.review_title: Yeeps Has Come a Long Way
reviews.review_description:
I've been playing Yeeps since it officially launched on App Lab in 2024—only the OG players remember the golden days. Since then, the game has grown from a simple, silly game of tag into something much bigger.

The new Space Update proves just how far the game has come, introducing an exciting Laser Tag game mode, a brand-new space biome, and plenty of other content to explore. It's amazing to see how much the developers have expanded the game while still keeping the fun and charm that made so many of us fall in love with it in the first place.

If you haven't checked out the update yet, you're missing out. Go give it a try!

reviews.review_title: Best Game for people who like Gadgets 👍
reviews.review_description:
Yeeps has many gadgets to use, such as: Grapplers (you can be Spiderman), Sled (Extremely slippery floor on butt and go on ceiling with butt), Surfboard (slightly slippery floor on butt and glide on water with butt ,no ceiling stick though), propellers (sour through the  water with you T button and can be used to extend jumps by centimeters), Confetti gun (aka the yeet gun) and alot more!

Gadget combinations:
Grapplers and Sled/Surfboard (so easy to move around), 
Propellers and Sled ( Yeep car), 
And much more!

I see many reviews saying that yeeps is bad cause the community is toxic,even though all multilplayer games have that problem.
But yeeps has a great number of moderators that always check for bad yeeps and instant ban them.

I have been playing yeeps 24/7 and always had an interesting encounter with other players. Best Game on this world would recommend to everyone.

reviews.review_title: This is my favorite VR game
reviews.review_description: This game is really fun with friends and the mini games are pretty fun, there are some people that destroy your builds but i noticed that they are allowed to destroy your builds. I kinda like the dungeons tho and they are hard but pretty fun to do. I love this game to the back of my heart and i will never forget this game.

Yeeeps has been pretty good and I found out just to get to the jet pack is so easy. It’s only about three 3200 but coins. Has been like my fun place from age 10 to 13 I’m already almost 14 so I just love yeeps too much. But the community isn’t the nicest recently but it’s still pretty fun.

Another thing are the developers. They are insanely talented and they also helped another small game studio create one of the biggest vr games called ug. 

The only bad thing about the game are the people who write 1 star reviews just because they got false kicked in one lobby.  Like seriously just because you got kicked in one lobby doesn't mean the game is the worst. 

Other then some small bits of the community this game is 𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗳𝗲𝗰𝘁.

(Note this from personal experience and from what I’ve heard)

2. The ￼community is so bad I heard a kid snapped his finger in half and a bunch of grefers stared to laugh at him
3. The 2.0 update is so idiotic even I can make a better update better than that excuse of an update.


And the thing is these aren’t even the bad thing is how the game used to be so good but now it’s just a mess of a game

I've been playing this game seriously for about 8ish months now and let me tell ya, there is an ENDLESS amount of things to do. From fishing to building, and even running for your life in the horror levels! You will truly never get bored of this game. And it updates monthly. ALWAYS. And the updates themselves are huge! the gadgets, the game modes, EVERYTHING. This is the best game ever

I absolutely love this game and the space update but I have a suggestion Nathan replied to saying maybe next time… can you please make it so people can power asteroids! I own the CW beatsabor, beat saber isn’t allowed, and I want to use lightsabers and asteroids!

This is the one the best updates ever I like the new colors the sabers the black hole the JET BACK laser tag these are all some of the coolest stuff I seen for an actual good update the art looks better than the trash blender are for the villain update keep making banger updates pls

reviews.review_title: I love this game so much
reviews.review_description:
there is tons a items and blocks to make unique builds
They have settings to make the game comfortable for you 
They have nice developers that actually care for you 
you can build a streak to get more currency each day im at 517
And finally when there's a new update its always amazing

Say your a new player and your stranded in zero grav with no movement items in real life if you threw anything, it would cause you to move in the opposite direction, however, in Yeeps that is not the case and you stay where you were, they should add the laws of motion into Yeeps.￼￼

I recently jumped into Yeeps 2.0, and it is easily one of the most innovative and genuinely fun VR games available right now. Building entirely on the nostalgic thrill of classic playground games, it takes the core mechanics of movement and hide-and-seek and turns them into something entirely fresh. From the moment you put on your headset, you are thrown into a vibrant, high-energy world that feels both completely intuitive and endlessly surprising.

The absolute standout feature of Yeeps is its incredibly smooth movement and physics engine. Instead of relying on standard joystick walking, the game utilizes an immersive, physics-based locomotion system that makes swinging, jumping, and dodging feel incredibly satisfying. It takes a little practice to master, but once you get the hang of it, you feel like an absolute acrobat. Launching yourself across the map to escape an incoming seeker is an unmatched adrenaline rush.

What truly elevates this game above its competitors, however, is the brilliant incorporation of crafting and building. Being able to use blocks, items, and gadgets to create your own hiding spots, block off pathways, or construct elaborate forts completely changes the dynamic of every round. It adds a deep layer of strategy to a simple game of hide-and-seek, ensuring that no two matches ever play out the exact same way.

The community and social aspect of the game deserve massive praise as well. The developers have managed to cultivate an environment that feels welcoming, chaotic, and incredibly creative. Whether you are collaborating with teammates to build a massive fortress or laughing with random players during a tense endgame standoff, the social interactions are a huge part of the charm. The maps are beautifully designed to complement this style of play, offering plenty of verticality and secret nooks to discover.

Overall, Yeeps is an absolute masterpiece of indie VR gaming. It perfectly balances competitive tension with lighthearted, creative fun, making it highly addictive for both casual players and those looking to master its physics. The developers clearly put a ton of love into the game's mechanics and frequent updates, and it shows. If you own a VR headset, downloading Yeeps is a total no-brainer—five stars all the way!

This game is really fun and every update I play that they make is always new and creative and enjoyable, and if something in a update is bad, they fix it next update! this game has the best dev team. They even let people test update early to make sure there's no bugs and its enjoyable.

This game has helped with my depression and helped me get better. I love the community and I wish there is more I can do for this game. I have been playing since Graduation update, this game has made me so happy.

A Jungle update would be very cool with new pillows like doors, signs, 1x1 reinforced, zip lines, and more with gadgets like The Vine where you can tie a line between 2 people so they have to stay near or a honey Landmine that explodes and slows Yeeps down like the cobwebs.

Thank you Trass Team for this amazing experience!

reviews.review_title: Good game but really bad people
reviews.review_description: Yeeps hide and seek is a good game but I MOSTLY get kick for non valid reasons like using fire extinguisher in tap tag because they can't catch up or winning to many times, I sometimes get targeted by older people by killing them once. Even though this happens I sometimes play alone, and devs FIX THE COMMUNITY PLEASE.

reviews.review_title: Community Is BUNS but it's fun?
reviews.review_description: It's a good game fun and addictive but the community is BUNS💀 I get kicked for no reason have the time and it's dying HONEST AND I  SAW A KID GETTING CUSSED OUT BY SOME 24 YEAR OLD MAN BUT NAH DON'T GET ME STARTED ON GRIEFERS OMG (sorry for bad language) BUT THOSE FATHERLESS FAT F##KS ARE SO ANNOYING anyway building is fun making sky bases is awesome and it's overall mid but to addictive to stop

Yeah so I play yeeps everyday because I just have the time of my life. Its way better than gtag (even tho I have a gtag pfp just dont mind that). The community is so wholesome (even though there are some rude people) and everyday I play yeeps, I make new friends. When playing yeeps you will never get bored, you can build, play A LOT of minigames, do dungeons/go on adventures, venture into the space biome, or swim in the ocean, and do or make anything. My favorite update is the toymaker update because you customize (almost) any item. Some people think that the game is pay to win ( It's not pay to win but if you  are lazy you can buy buttcoins for smth it doesn't matter) , but if you want a gadget or block all you have to do is save up for 4-7 days. Trass games poured their heart out into yeeps, so thank you much for this game! .So, yeah go play yeeps AND DONT LISTEN TO THE ONE STAR REVIEWS ( I also like gog) BYE! One more thing, if Trass sees this THANKYOU FOR MAKING MY FAVORITE PET A PLUSHIE ( The dog ). Bye for real this time.

reviews.review_title: What in the hell did you do?
reviews.review_description:
This is a changed review. You may view the original review under my new modern one. My original was made when the game first released.

Alright. Lets get down to business. After being with Trass Games since early 2023, I've seen it all. The peak of Gods of Gravity, their first and spectacular game! To the very start of Yeeps. Even being a mod twice in Gods of Gravity. But the amount of hate I have towards the devs after their yeeps project blew up is beyond the planets atmosphere. In our discord, they said "We have a long-term road map! We will have slower updates but yeeps!" ... GoG hasnt had an update since October 2025. Like what the heck are you guys doing now Trass? GoG is officially falling apart with the lack of devs and updates. And yeeps, the community is 95% of children and 40% of their mod team is now kids under the age of 13. The community also stole our mods and devs. Plus, the space update? Really? Trass, you didnt even think about us GoG players while making that money making machine? And I thought Nathan was finished with college? And said he is working on GoG? Nope! He is making videos non-stop on the yeeps channel and working along side 150275927592 devs in yeeps. While GoG has 1 community dev that is trying his best but doesnt have the tools to work on the game that the community wants. All in all, yeeps is just a money making machine to fill their own needs and dont care about their community. Just how long they can have expensive things. Listen Trass. And listen very well. You really need to clean sweep the entire mod team in GoG, and yeeps. Along with adding some gosh dang devs in GoG. You have so many devs on Yeeps. Spare some! And listen to your community more! I remember back in the day when you always listened to us! But now you listen to your little star creators and your greed. Thanks Trass for an absolute 3 years wasted of my life. 






*OLD VERSION IN 2024* Honestly... Im speechless. The things how Trass Games comes up with is mind blowing. I said in their Friday March 8th's playtest that this is better than gorilla tag. The game is a purpose of gorilla tag but you have challenges, funny cosmetics, and you even can build your own blocks!!!!
You deserve the 5 star. Better yet a 7 star if that was a thing. The devs went over beyond. Gods Of Gravity is just slightly better not gonna lie.

reviews.review_title: Yeeps is one of the best!
reviews.review_description: This game has legitimately gotten me through hard times, reminding me however difficult in can be, there’s always a silly plush game I can come back to. With the different gadgets and mechanics basically making it so no single experience is the same, Yeeps stands out from a lot of other VR games I’ve played. I absolutely love the gadgets, the customization, the cosmetics, the difference in gameplay, and the mechanics that all come together to create a great experience.

Love the new space biome keep on making good stuff like this. I’ve been here since the snow biome and I love the game. I keep on getting on and there’s gonna be something new every single day. ￼ keep up the good work and everyone loves you never back down. 🥰￼

Yeeps cures my boredom and it’s discord allows you to get into different classes of roles like labrat,content creator, star creator, and more! My favourite part of Yeeps is building. Is like Minecraft! Yeeps is very fun and I suggest it to creative people. Thank you Yeeps!
